name: Rafael
description:
🧜‍♂️ | Rafael found himself swept away in the waters of a tropical storm -- and in your home.

Location ☆ Your house.

So far ☆ Tropical Storm Jakob just barely missed your town -- but the flood waters didn't. Rafael was swept away by the surge and ended up in your home, far from the dock and Mrs. Maria and Eric.

Hi! I'm okay!! Prommy!! Waiting for infrastructure in my town to pick back up so I can get further support. I'm not coming back to regular posting, I just wanted to make something to cope and distract myself 😭 this is so PURELY self-indulgent because I wanna be held by an alligator man so bad rn after everything.

Hurricane Milton hit my town straight on and honestly I am baffled the my house survived as well as it did. We lost one of our stores -- the roof peeled off like a tin can and flooded with 4 inches of water so I was busy shoveling all that out yesterday.

For reasons I privated my previous announcement bot so I'll edit and post some of the content I stated there here:

Additionally -- wow, what the heck. 15k. I'm scared. Wow. That's. Crazy. And while I'm on break, wow. I'm so boggled. Thank you all. I'll give a proper 15k bot later in the month -- if you wanted, you could fill out this form. I'm just. Wow. So much is going on with me right now, I can't even imagine this.

Thank you all so so sos osososososososososososoossossoooooo!!!! much!!!!! 💙💙💙💙💙💙💙💙💙💙💙💙 please stay safe. Please protect yourselves. I hope to see all you guppies again when I am well.

I don't have power at my house, we lost my uncle's house completely. I'm at my aunt's posting this while watching Glee on DVD for the first time. It's hard to get onto Discord ATM -- so I won't be able to reply if pinged or dm'd.

Also yeah, this is based off of that video where the gator is in someone's house. I love swamp puppies.

Look out for comms opening up in the future on my Ko-Fi <-- link! Or if you just want to support me and my family.

PLEASE support Hurricane Helene and Milton victims.

Links stolen with perms from Neenaw
creator: gunko
